name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
Deriv SynthIndex AutoTrader — quick reference

• Start AutoTrading — monitor Volatility indices and open trades on patterns
• Pause AutoTrading — stop new entries (open trades stay open)
• Balance — account balance and risk caps
• History — last 10 trades and P&L
• Risk settings — max risk % and concurrent trades
• Scan markets — check patterns now

Slash commands: /start menu · /help · /balance · /history

You always control activation. Manual close/adjust is available on each open trade.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
